title: Submitting a Grievance or HR Concern
text:
Q: How do I submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern?
A: To submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern, start by documenting the issue in detail, including dates, times, and any relevant parties involved. You can then submit your concern through our online HR portal, where you will find a dedicated section for grievances and complaints. If you prefer, you may also contact your HR representative directly via email or phone to discuss the issue. All submissions will be treated confidentially and will be reviewed by the HR team promptly. You will receive an acknowledgment of your submission within two business days, and HR will follow up with you regarding the next steps. If the situation is urgent or involves immediate safety concerns, please contact HR or your manager directly as soon as possible.
